scripts.build: npm run build -w @boardcad/core && npm run build -w ripple-desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @boardcad/core && npm run test -w ripple-desktop
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @boardcad/core && npm run typecheck -w ripple-desktop
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.rebuild-test-launch: npm run verify && npm run tauri:dev
